---
name: New Content Proposal
about: Propose a new affix, doom card, encounter type, town building, event, general, achievement, or other content
labels: new-content
---

## Content Type

> What kind of content is this?

- [ ] Affix
- [ ] Doom Card
- [ ] Encounter Type
- [ ] Town Building
- [ ] Event
- [ ] Demon General
- [ ] Achievement
- [ ] Other: ___________

---

## Name

> What is this content called?

---

## Rules Text

> Write the full rules text as it would appear in the document.

---

## Where It Fits

> Which document would this be added to, and where?
> Example: `AFFIXES-V1.0.md, Tier 2`

---

## Design Intent

> What role does this content play? What problem does it solve or what experience does it create?

---

## Balance Considerations

> Any concerns about power level, interaction with existing rules, or edge cases?
